aknrenderer-desc: Stores and renders Akoma Ntoso (AKN) legislative XML as browsable wiki pages.
aknrenderer-render-invalidxml: This page does not contain well-formed XML and cannot be rendered.
aknrenderer-render-nobody: No body element was found in this Akoma Ntoso document.
aknrenderer-provenance: Last amended by $1, in force from $2
lawsamendedby-summary: The laws and decrees amended by a given gazette issue.
lawsamendedby-prompt: Open this page with a gazette page name in the URL, for example Special:LawsAmendedBy/Gazette:FEK A 12-2026.
lawsamendedby-empty: No applied amendments originate from this gazette.
inforcestatus-summary: Each consolidated law or decree and the version currently in force.
inforcestatus-empty: No consolidated versions are recorded yet.
aknrenderer-render-invalidschema: This document does not conform to the Akoma Ntoso schema:
aknrenderer-save-invalidschema: This page was not saved because it is not valid Akoma Ntoso. The schema reported the following: $1
aknrenderer-revisions-intro: Each row is a codified version of the law. Click a date to view the law as it stood then.
aknrenderer-revisions-notakn: This page is not an Akoma Ntoso document.
apihelp-aknreference-summary: Look up Akoma Ntoso documents and their structural eIds, for cross-reference authoring.
apihelp-aknreference-param-query: Search text, matched against page title, FRBR Work URI, and alias (used with <kbd>op=search</kbd>).
apihelp-aknreference-param-title: Page title to list eIds for (used with <kbd>op=eids</kbd>; alternative to <var>pageid</var>).
apihelp-aknreference-param-pageid: Page ID to list eIds for (used with <kbd>op=eids</kbd>; alternative to <var>title</var>).
apihelp-aknreference-example-eids: List the structural eIds of the page "Law:Example".
